local_documents.name: Local Documents
local_documents.description: Local notes and text documents ingested into the timeline

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether local document sync is active.

root_paths.label: Document Folders
root_paths.description: Local folders to scan for notes and text documents.

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: How local documents should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to rescan the folders for changed documents.

cognition_exclude_folders.label: Search-only Folders
cognition_exclude_folders.description: Folders read for search and timeline but kept out of knowledge extraction.

max_file_bytes.label: Max File Size (bytes)
max_file_bytes.description: Files larger than this are skipped.

max_body_chars.label: Max Text Characters
max_body_chars.description: Maximum characters stored from each document body.

activation.title: Enable Local Documents
activation.description: Local documents can contain private notes. Choose the folders Magi may read before enabling this source.
